People · expertise · relationships

Specialist directory

These are briefing cards, not biographies: role, geography, tags, and outbound links in the full profile. Filters here use the same data attributes as site search, so what you filter is what you can find globally.

Go to startups Verification methodology

Relationship preview

Open a profile to see the sticky editorial column: role timeline, expertise wheel, external references, and last file touch.

Search by name, role, country, market segment or technology tag.

Filters and search stay in the URL so you can share a link.

Editorial standards and quality controls

Editorial standards and quality controls

Image-free editorial feed: names, mandates, and tight context on the surface; photography, timelines, and ecosystem links inside each dossier. No algorithmic filler—pages are edited for clarity and claims you can cross-check.

Read methodology
